blended.narrative: Le Massif is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,701 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 22" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
